thing-type.label: Growatt account
thing-type.description: The growatt account the binding should use

parameter.name: username
parameter.label: The growatt username
parameter.description: The username used to login to the server.growatt.com website

parameter.name: password
parameter.label: The growatt password
parameter.description: The password as used to login to the server.growatt.com website

parameter.name: server
parameter.label: Server name
parameter.description: The dns name of the server hosting the open Growatt API.
